info.name: Contsrix Core API - Attendance Module
info.description: Postman collection for the Employee Attendance and Leave Management module of Contsrix Core API.

item.name: Attendance Management
item.description: Endpoints for managing employee clock-in/out, breaks, and attendance records.

item.name: Leave Management
Leave Requests
item.description: Endpoints for managing employee leave requests.

item.name: Leave Balances
item.description: Endpoints for managing employee leave balances (Admin/HR).
Endpoints related to employee leave requests, types, and balances.

item.name: Reports
item.description: Endpoints for generating and exporting attendance and leave reports (Admin/HR).

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Endpoints for fetching dashboard statistics for different user roles.
